Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

YOS 20, 002 [Sale of slave][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-LA₂ ina ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂ mra-aḫ-mat-d60 lu₂ARAD-su

o 22

ma-ta-ʾa-li-iḫ-ʾa-a-an lu₂ARAD-su md60-ŠEŠ-LA₂ lu₂ARAD-su PAP 3 lu₂ARAD-MEŠ1

o 33

ša₂ ŠU-MIN 15-šu₂-nu a-na MU ša₂ mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-LA₂ šaṭ-rat a-na 3 MA.NA

o 44

⸢KU₃⸣.[BABBAR] qa-lu-u₂ a-na ŠAM₂ gam-ru-tu₂ a-na mdna-⸢na⸣-a-MU DUMU ša₂ mta-nit-tu₄-d60

o 55

A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu₂ a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ it-⸢ta-din KU₃⸣.BABBAR ⸢a₄?⸣ 3 MA.NA qa-lu-u

o 66

⸢ŠAM₂⸣ mra-aḫ-mat-d60 ma-ta-ʾa-li-iḫ-ʾa-a-an u m[d60]-⸢ŠEŠ-LA₂ lu₂ARAD-MEŠ⸣ MU!-MEŠ2

o 77

⸢ana⸣ E₂ E₃-PA.PA.PA a-bat-ti₃ mman-nu-ki-⸢i-d⸣DIL-BAT DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-LA₂ ina ŠU-MIN

o 88

mdna-na-a-MU DUMU ša₂ mta-nit-⸢tu₄⸣-[d60] ⸢ma⸣-ḫir e-ṭir u₄-mu pa-qa-ri

o 99

ana ⸢muḫ⸣-ḫi mra-aḫ-mat-d60 ma-ta-[ʾa]-⸢li⸣-[iḫ]-⸢ʾa⸣-a-an u ⸢m⸣d60-ŠEŠ-LA₂3

o 1010

[lu₂ARAD]-⸢MEŠ⸣ MU-MEŠ it-tab-šu-u₂ ⸢m⸣[man-nu]-ki-i-dDIL-BAT u₂-mar-raq-⸢ma⸣ a-na

o 1111

[mdna]-⸢na⸣-a-⸢MU i⸣-[nam]-⸢din pu⸣-[ut] ⸢la⸣ lu₂⸢šir₃-ki-u₂⸣-tu₂ ⸢la⸣ [lu₂]⸢šu⸣-ša₂-nu-u₂-[tu₂]

o 1212

[la] lu₂DUMU DU₃⸢u₂⸣-[tu₂] ⸢la⸣ [lu₂ARAD] ⸢LUGAL⸣u₂-tu₂ la E₂ ANŠE.[KUR.RA] ⸢la⸣ E₂ giš⸢GU⸣.[ZA u]

o 1313

⸢la E₂ giš⸣[GIGIR ša₂ lu₂ARAD-MEŠ MU-MEŠ] ⸢a-na⸣ <u₄>-mu ṣa-a-tu₂ m⸢man-nu-ki⸣-i-dDIL-BAT ⸢na⸣-[šu-u₂]

o 1414

[pu-ut la ZAḪ₂ ša₂ lu₂ARAD-MEŠ MU-MEŠ a-di 100] ⸢u₄-mu⸣ mman-nu-ki-i-dDIL-BAT na-[šu-u₂]

Reverse
(witnesses)
r 11

lu₂mu-kin₇

r 22

mni-din-tu₄-d60 u md60-NUMUN-GIŠ DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ mta-nit-tu₄-d60 A-MEŠ m⸢ŠEŠ⸣-[ʾu-u₂-tu₂]

r 33

mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ mdUTU-SUR A mlu-uš-tam-[mar-dIŠKUR]

r 44

md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ md60-DIN-su-E A mŠEŠ-ʾu-⸢u₂⸣-[tu₂]

r 55

md60-ŠEŠ-MU⸢nu⸣ DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A mlu-uš-tam-mar-d⸢IŠKUR⸣

r 66

mGAL-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-NUMUN-DU₃ A mkur-i

r 77

md60-AD-GUR DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂ši A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu₂

r 88

md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mšir₃-ki-d60 A mŠU-d60

r 99

mKAR-d60 DUMU ša₂ md60-ik-ṣur A mḫun-zu-u₂

r 1010

mdna-na-a-MU DUMU ša₂ mki-din-dINANA lu₂ARAD E₂.GAL

uninscribed line
(colophon)
r 1111

md60-DINiṭ lu₂UMBISAG DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU A md30-TI-ER₂ UNUGki iti⸢ŠU?⸣

r 1212

U₄ 28-KAM₂ MU 12-KAM₂ mse-lu-ku LUGAL

na-din LU₂-ut-ti₃ MU-MEŠ
